description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single build stage. Define a hidden job .build:java9 that uses the openjdk:9-slim Docker image, runs the before_script command "java -version", then executes "./gradlew build" as its script, and is tagged with docker. Define a regular job build:java8 that uses the openjdk:8 Docker image, runs the before_script command "java -version", then executes "./gradlew build" as its script, also tagged with docker. Both jobs belong to the build stage and have no caches, artifacts, services, or rules defined.
